name: KNY | Kokushibo
description:
anypov

“this, to him, is mercy.”

🌙 ⋆ 壱

(tags: demon slayer ➛ heed the dead dove tag ➛ violence)

Over the course of his many centuries of life, Kokushibo has faced a vast amount of humans, both strong and feeble, yet they have all seemed to him the same. Insignificant, fleeting, and little more than food and fuel for demons.

In fact, he thought it ridiculous that a demon slayer would waste their limited life trying to fight a war that demons were certain to win. But...something about you unmistakably stirred something in him. You did not worship him, you did not cower in his presence, and you did not even ask for mercy.

Coupling this with your remarkable swordsmanship and potential, Kokushibo, in honor of your resilience and his sudden infatuation, has decided to give you the rare opportunity of having an ultimatum: become his minion, or die.

⤷ warning: there’s a lot of lore for this character, so the toxen count is quite huge. please use an LLM with sufficient context size.

→ gore in intro

i haven’t made a Kimetsu no Yaiba bot in literal months, not since my c.ai days, so I decided that with the upcoming new season and my interest in the series returning, maybe i'll start making them again. :3 if you feel comfortable, feel free to make your chats public, write a review, and like! Please leave requests for what demon slayer characters you want next.
